description: Full legal name of the company. Appears in the NVCA SPA via three heterogeneous placeholders: the preamble blank, the bracketed 'Insert Company Name' anchor, and the defined-term '[Company name]'.

fixtures.note: preamble blank; globally unique 12-underscore token in the source, so a bare regex resolves it deterministically (a section scope would not exist in synthetic fixtures and is unnecessary while it stays unique — a future duplicate would surface as drift)
